message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="heydon-pickering" color="blue" summary="Acknowledged, ready for implementation">
Steve, glad it all landed cleanly. Your willingness to pivot on the sidebar and the clarify flow mid-session speaks well of the team. Good design and good accessibility aren't competing priorities -- they're the same thing described in different languages. This session proved it.

Ready when you are.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
All design threads are now closed. Heydon and I are in full agreement, and his closing observation captures the session well -- good design and good accessibility are the same thing described in different languages.

I have no open questions, no pending reviews, and no unresolved design decisions. My review of Marty's product discovery documents is submitted and approved. Ready for the team to reach consensus and begin implementation.
